report.summary: Built two new learn guides — Jupiter DEX (Solana DeFi superapp, 658 lines) and Ondo Finance (RWA tokenization leader, 793 lines) — filling key content gaps for top-50 crypto projects with no existing coverage.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Content audit: reviewed all 516 published pages and 121 learn guides to identify gaps — confirmed Jupiter and Ondo had zero coverage despite being top-50 by market cap

Jupiter DEX: Solana's largest DEX aggregator, $2.6-3.5B TVL, 95% aggregator market share, evolved into full DeFi superapp with 250x perps, JupUSD stablecoin (Ethena partnership), Polymarket prediction market integration, Chainlink oracle integration. JUP token $0.17, ~$590M market cap, ATH $2.00

Ondo Finance: dominant RWA tokenization protocol, $2.52B TVL (404% YoY growth), largest issuer of tokenized US Treasuries (USDY >$1B on 9 chains) and tokenized stocks (202 assets, $963M value, 58.56% market share). State Street + Galaxy $200M SWEEP fund. Citadels for Islamic finance. ONDO token $0.28, ~$1.37B market cap

sections.title: Content Created
items: Jupiter guide (658 lines, ~3,500 words): What Jupiter is, how routing works, JUP token economics, core features (swaps, 250x perps, limit orders, liquid staking, JupUSD, token launches), Jupiter vs Raydium vs Orca comparison table, 6 risk categories, getting started guide, future outlook. 6-question FAQ.

Ondo Finance guide (793 lines, ~3,500 words): USDY and OUSG products, tokenized equities expansion, ONDO token governance with token-TVL disconnect analysis, SWEEP institutional fund, Citadels (Shariah-compliant), Ondo vs Maple vs Centrifuge comparison table, 7 risk categories including regulatory exposure. 5+ question FAQ.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Jupiter title: 'Jupiter Guide 2026: Solana's DeFi Superapp | degen0x' (52 chars, under 60 limit)
Jupiter keywords: 13 targeted (Jupiter DEX, JUP token, Solana DeFi superapp, etc.)
Ondo title: 'Ondo Finance Guide 2026: Tokenized Treasuries, Stocks & RWA Protocol' + degen0x suffix
Ondo keywords: 8 targeted (Ondo Finance, USDY, OUSG, RWA, tokenized treasuries, etc.)
Both pages: Article + FAQ structured data schemas, OpenGraph + Twitter cards, Breadcrumb + BackToTop components
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
Bug fix: removed 'use client' from Ondo page that would have broken Next.js metadata export
Bug fix: trimmed Jupiter title from 91 to 52 chars (was over Google's 60-char display limit)
